executives.name: Thomas Saueressig
executives.background: Thomas Saueressig is a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE, leading Customer Services & Delivery. He has been with SAP since 2004.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Executive Board / Chief Customer Officer

executives.name: Vishal Sikka
executives.background: Founder and CEO of Vianai Systems, Inc. and former CEO of Infosys Limited.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Executive Board / CTO

executives.name: Xiaoqun Clever
executives.background: Xiaoqun Clever has over 20 years' experience in technology and digital transformation. She has held senior executive roles at SAP SE and Ringier AG.

tenure_dates.title: EVP, President of Labs China; COO of Tech & Innovation
